title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Giants, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Big Mom as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 63 years ago

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sadness and rage everbrate through the air!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ASAP- Pearance of Mother Carmel and the Little Children

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, Unbe- Knownst to even big mom herself,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were some that saw the whole incident unfold before their eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Two, to be exact.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One was someone that cared a great deal about the lamb's house,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What Happen- Ed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and was dropping by for a visit.

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: A Warrior of Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He, horrified by what he saw,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ran off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and he never again set foot on that island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eventually, his story reached the ears of Elbaf itself and the rest of the giant race,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and Charlotte Rinrin grew to be so repugned by the Giants that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They refrained from even saying her name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The other witness

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Chew Chew

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was a chef and former, ruined pirate that had been living on the island for some time:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Streuses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: to him, the sight was positively hilarious.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wahahaha Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kukuku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've never seen a monster like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His power was an ability to change the various things

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Chew Chew

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of this world into ingredients: the Kukukuki no mi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I just leave 'er alone, she'll die for sure. And that'll be a waste!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Missy, let's talk about our dreams or somethin'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mister, who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi, don't get too close, alright?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll be back eventually, I bet. But until then, I'll stick with ya!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll never have to worry about eatin' again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These two, who had never before met before that moment, would go on to build the big mom pirates of today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Rinrin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Return to your senses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They're going to shoot you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: When Mama's weakened!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And when no one in this hall can move for at least the next 5 seconds!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
